prerequisites: A WorkRamp account with an Academy (Customer Academy) you want to extract data from.
An Admin user in WorkRamp. API tokens can only be generated for Admin users, and the token owner must remain an active Admin for requests to succeed.
The Academy ID of the target Academy, found in the URL of the WorkRamp admin console after navigating to that Academy (used as the academy_id config field).
A WorkRamp API key (Bearer token), provided as the api_key secret field.

authMethods.name: API key (Bearer token)
authMethods.summary: WorkRamp uses HTTP Bearer authentication. Supply your API key as the api_key field; pm sends it in the Authorization header as 'Authorization: Bearer YOUR_API_KEY'. The key can only be generated for Admin users and is invalidated only on request.

setupSteps.title: Generate an API key as an Admin
setupSteps.body: Sign in to WorkRamp as an Admin user. Generate an API token through WorkRamp's API key management (Admin users only). Keep the key secret. WorkRamp invalidates tokens only upon request, and the backend verifies the token owner is still an active Admin.

setupSteps.title: Locate your Academy ID
setupSteps.body: Log into the WorkRamp admin console and navigate to the Academy you want to pull data from. Copy the Academy ID from the page URL. All Customer Academy endpoints require academy_id as a path parameter, so this value is required.

setupSteps.title: Configure the connector
setupSteps.body: Set academy_id to the Academy ID you copied, and set api_key to the API key you generated. pm authenticates against the WorkRamp API base URL https://app.workramp.com/api/v1/ using the Authorization: Bearer header and scopes requests to the given Academy.
